## ISerializedPathTrieNode.valueIndex property

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

Index into the `values` array of the containing [ILookupByPathJson](./lookup-by-path.ilookupbypathjson.md)<></>. If `undefined`<></>, this node has no associated value.

**Signature:**

```typescript
valueIndex?: number;
```
